task-registry.task: Initialize Vite + TypeScript + KAPLAY project with dependencies
Create KAPLAY game instance and styled title screen scene
Add game state manager and scene routing infrastructure
Create dungeon data model with room graph and types
Build room scene with styled panels, room-type icons, and exit buttons
Implement fog of war and room discovery
Add room-type visual differentiation with themed colors and backgrounds
Create combat scene with player and enemy HP bars and action buttons
Implement turn-based combat logic with Fight/Spells/Bag/Run
Add 3 enemy types with different stats and canvas-drawn sprites
Implement combat rewards (XP, crystals) and return to room navigation
Create rune inventory system with 5 base runes
Build forge scene UI with rune selection and crafting interface
Implement spell recipes (3+ combinations) and crafted spell usage in combat
Create dialogue scene with NPC portrait and text display
Implement branching choices with gameplay effects
Create persistent HUD with HP/mana bars, floor, and tick count
Add Map overlay menu showing explored rooms
Add Spellbook overlay menu showing crafted spells
Extract game data into JSON content pack files
Implement localStorage save/load with auto-save
Add leveling system with XP thresholds and stat increases
Full game loop verification and softlock fixes
Visual polish pass and consistency check
Production build, architecture doc, and final verification
